title: MetaMap pipeline
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ab498","text":"We developed a bioinformatic two-step pipeline, so called \"MetaMap\" pipeline,  to screen human RNA-seq datasets for the presence of microbial and viral reads by re-inspecting the non-human-mapping read fraction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b3l6","text":"In the first step, reads are aligned against the human genome with STAR (version 2.5.2) and subsequently the non-human-mapping reads are subjected to metatgenomic classification using CLARK-S (version 1.2.3).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Sebastian Karg
